io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio

Class PacIO

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.PacIO

  • public final class PacIO
extends java.lang.Object
    The main class of the PacIO library.

    This class serves as the main gateway for importing Pac-Man ROM sets into a PacROMSet instance, which resemble unified ROM sets, using the importROMSet method. It can also save the unified ROM sets to disk as ZIP files via the saveROMSet method, and open them into memory with the openROMSet method. It is the go-to class for accessing and managing Pac-Man ROM sets.

    Because this is a main class for a library, it cannot be instantiated by any means via its private constructor, PacIO(). All methods in this class are static, and can easily be accessed. No need to worry about creating an instance of this class.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static PacROMSet importROMSet(java.lang.String path)
      Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set into a PacROMSet instance, which is the unified version of the said ROM set.
      static PacROMSet openROMSet(java.lang.String path)
      Opens an existing unified Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file to memory.
      static void saveROMSet(java.lang.String path, PacROMSet pacROMSet)
      Saves the unified Pac-Man ROM set to disk as a ZIP file.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • importROMSet

        public static final PacROMSet importROMSet(java.lang.String path)
                                    throws java.io.IOException
        Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set into a PacROMSet instance, which is the unified version of the said ROM set.

        A notable example for this is importing a ZIP file called pacman.zip, which contains all the original ROM files from the ROM set ZIP file. Another example would be puckman.zip, which is the same thing. Both ROM set ZIP files can be converted into their respective unified ROM sets via this method.

        On the other note, this method should not work on existing unified versions of the ROM set ZIP file. To open these kinds of ZIP files, the openROMSet method should be relied on.

        Parameters:
        path - The file path to the original ROM set ZIP file.
        Returns:
        An instance of the unified Pac-Man ROM set.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - When accessing the ZIP file from disk fails.

      • openROMSet

        public static final PacROMSet openROMSet(java.lang.String path)
                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Opens an existing unified Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file to memory.

        This method should only work on unified versions of the Pac-Man ROM set ZIP files, which contains entries like program.bin and graphic.bin. It should not work on the original ROM set ZIP files, which have their own ROM files. They should be imported via the importROMSet method instead.

        Parameters:
        path - The file path to the universal ROM set ZIP file.
        Returns:
        An instance of the unified Pac-Man ROM set.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - When accessing the ZIP file from disk fails.

      • saveROMSet

        public static final void saveROMSet(java.lang.String path,
                                    PacROMSet pacROMSet)
                             throws java.io.IOException
        Saves the unified Pac-Man ROM set to disk as a ZIP file.

        This should create a new ZIP file if it doesn't exist on disk. Otherwise, it'll just overwrite the data.

        Parameters:
        path - The destination file path to the ZIP file.
        pacROMSet - The unified Pac-Man ROM set.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - When saving the ZIP file from disk fails.
